# Stack

## Languages & Runtimes

| Language | Version | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|
| Go | 1.22 | Primary implementation language |

## Key Dependencies

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| gopkg.in/yaml.v3 | latest | YAML parsing for `.ember` recipe files |
| github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea | v0.25.0 | TUI framework (planned) |
| github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss | v0.9.1 | Terminal styling for TUI (planned) |

## Tooling

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `go build` | Compiles the CLI binary |
| `go test` | Runs unit/integration tests |
| `go vet` | Static analysis |

## Entry Point

- `cmd/emberglow/main.go` — CLI entry point (not yet implemented)
- `internal/dsl/parser.go` — Recipe parsing
- `internal/engine/engine.go` — Recipe execution engine
